summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EntropyX - Blockchain Validator Fairness & Analytics Platform. All core backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. 1000-round simulation, entropy selection, validator management, and analytics all operational.

fixed_issues.issue: JSON parsing error when request body is empty but content-type is application/json
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Added try-catch block to handle empty JSON body gracefully

minor_warnings.issue: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height)
minor_warnings.note: Charts render correctly despite warnings - cosmetic issue only

minor_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Get Started and Try Demo buttons
Dashboard loads with all 4 panels (Current Selection, Entropy Engine, Fairness Metrics, Validator Network)
POST /api/session/create creates new session with default validators
GET /api/validators returns validators for session
POST /api/select-validator selects random validator using entropy (100% confidence)
POST /api/simulate-rounds runs 1000-round simulation successfully
GET /api/fairness-report returns comprehensive analytics (86.4% fairness, 75.8% decentralization)
GET /api/entropy-status returns entropy engine status (100% pool health, all sources active)
POST /api/validators/add adds new validator successfully
DELETE /api/validators/remove/{id} removes validator
PATCH /api/validators/{id} toggles validator status (ACTIVE ↔ INACTIVE)
Select Validator button works and updates UI with selected validator
Run 1000-Round Simulation button executes full simulation with progress overlay
Add Validator dialog opens, accepts input, and creates validator
Charts render correctly (bar chart, pie chart, line chart) with real data
Selection History table displays selection records
Entropy status indicators show all systems active
Fairness metrics display correctly after simulation
Validator network panel shows all validators with management controls
Real-time UI updates work properly
Navigation between landing page and dashboard works
Demo mode functionality works without authentication
